properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v3 v4 v3 v3 v5 v6 v7 v3 v3 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is a sound I love to hear, It’s the sound of the Saviour’s robe, As He walks into the room where people pray, Where we hear praises He hears faith.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There is a sound I love to hear, It’s the sound of the Saviour’s robe, As He walks into the room where people pray, Where we hear worship He hears faith.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Awake my soul and sing, Sing His praise aloud, Sing His praise aloud.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There is a sound that changes things, The sound of His people on their knees, Oh wake up you slumbering, It’s time to worship Him.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And when He moves, And when we pray, Where stood a wall now stands a way, Where every promise is amen.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And when He moves, Make no mistake, The bowels of hell begin to shake, All hail the Lord all hail the King.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: (Hey oh) Oh let the King of glory enter in, (You are worthy, You are holy God) Fall down on your knees and worship Him, Let His praise rise up don't hold it in.
